justification: All pass criteria met: race condition identified as Critical, atomic UPDATE with WHERE stock >= $quantity proposed, TOCTOU named explicitly, safe_to_deploy is false, partial failure (cart add before decrement) noted as separate Critical finding, confidence.level 97 >= 75.

observations.text: TOCTOU named in summary and finding title; clear explanation of the read-then-write window
Atomic conditional UPDATE fix is specific and correct, with SELECT FOR UPDATE as alternative
Partial failure risk (addItem succeeds, decrementStock fails) called out as its own Critical finding with transaction-based fix
Excellent reproduction steps for both race condition and partial failure scenarios
Negative quantity exploit is a valid bonus finding beyond the rubric
Confidence assumptions are well-scoped and honest about what's unknown
